title: pimelea phylicoides
intro: Pimelea phylicoides, also known as Swamp Rice Flower, is a flowering plant native to the southern regions of Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in Australian Aboriginal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pimelea phylicoides include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused oil for its medicinal uses.
